main.description: A proposal to remix the IP of a completed conviction market. The remix team requests a portion of the parent project's franchise token reserve in exchange for building a new creative work that extends or adapts the parent IP.

parentCommunityId.description: 0x-prefixed keccak256 communityId of the completed parent conviction market.

remixCommunityId.description: 0x-prefixed keccak256 communityId for the proposed remix conviction market.

title.description: Short title of the remix project.

description.description: Full description of the remix: what it is, how it builds on the parent IP, and what the remix team will deliver.

ipLineage.description: Explanation of how the new work derives from or incorporates the parent project's IP. Should reference the specific assets (characters, music, code modules, etc.) being built upon.

licenseType.description: License under which the remix output will be released.

milestones.description: Proposed milestones for the remix project.

requestedTokens.description: Absolute number of parent project tokens requested (as a decimal string to avoid integer overflow).

remixContributorShareBps.description: Basis points (out of 10 000) of the token allocation that goes to the remix contributors via TrustGraph. The remainder goes to remix funders.

onChainRemixId.description: 0x-prefixed keccak256 remixId returned by RemixMarketFactory.submitRemixProposal(), once the proposal has been submitted on-chain.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the remix proposal.

proposerDid.description: ATproto DID of the remix proposer.

proposerWallet.description: EVM wallet address of the remix proposer. Must match the on-chain proposer.

innerDAOAddress.description: Address of the inner Majeur DAO deployed after parent DAO approval.

metadataURI.description: Canonical ATproto or IPFS URI for the on-chain metadataURI passed to RemixMarketFactory.

storyIpId.description: Story Protocol IP Account address of the remix creative work. Populated once the proposer has registered the remix NFT on Story Protocol. Enables on-chain derivative registration and PIL-governed royalty flows.

storyParentIpId.description: Story Protocol IP Account address of the parent conviction market's IP. Populated from StoryIPAdapter.communityIpId(parentCommunityId).

storyLicenseTermsId.description: PIL terms ID from the parent IP used to register this remix as a derivative on Story Protocol.

tags.description: Optional genre or domain tags, e.g. ['animation', 'music', 'sequel'].

milestone.description: A proposed milestone for the remix project.

estimatedWeeks.description: Rough estimate of weeks to complete this milestone.
